name: SAT Prep
description: August 2026 Digital SAT — Math and Reading & Writing. Study rhythm, official practice, and strategy inside Learn v2. Pair with Khan Academy SAT and Bluebook.

name: Mathematics
description: From pre-algebra foundations through calculus and linear algebra. Rebuild your math intuition from the ground up.

name: Science Literacy
description: Understand how the world works. Physics, chemistry, biology, and the scientific method.

name: Computer Science
description: Learn to think like a programmer. From Python basics to algorithms and system design.

name: Programming with Python
description: Learn Python from scratch. Variables, functions, data structures, and libraries for practical data analysis.

name: Probability & Statistics
description: The math of uncertainty. From basic probability to Monte Carlo simulations.

name: Artificial Intelligence
description: From basic ML to LLMs. Understand the technology reshaping software, learning, and work.

name: Personal Finance
description: Budgeting, saving, investing, credit, and taxes. Build a durable money foundation.
